titleStmt.title: SII 6.183: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 183. (A.R. No. 221 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadgōṁkādhipasya ssakalaguṇanidhē[¨rddha¨rmma]vānbhāginēyō jākkākhyō bhā
ti lōkē kuśikariṣikulādagraṇīḥ kāṇvaśākhī . dhīmānāccāṁbikāyāṁ dhara
ṇivarapadābjaikabhriṁggasya sūnuḥ Īśāmātyasya dīpaṁ jagadadhipata
yē bāvanārāyaṇāya . svasti śrīmattribhuvanacakrava¨rtti śrīrājarājadēva
ra vijayarājyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 11 ṇḍagu śrāhi śakava(ru)¨rṣaṁbulu 1078
di yagunēṁṭi phālguṇa bahala yakādaśiyu śanivāramunāṁ
ḍu Uttamacōḍavalanāṁ prēṁpalli śrībāvanārā
yaṇadēvaraku sū¨ryya grahaṇanimittamuna dha¨rmmā[¨rtthamuṁgā]
ṁ dama¨rcca vedrukuṁṭa daḍikāmarāju koḍku mādirāju vīri ko
ḍuku Isanapeggaḍa [A]lluṁḍu jakkana Ācaṁdrā¨rkka makhaṁḍava
¨rttidīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina birudumāḍalu 12 vīniṁ jēkoni paduvanapaṁḍi
tula koḍuku pe¨rmmāḍi paṁḍitulu ru 25 gōkanavaṁḍitula koḍku sabbanapaṁ
ḍitulu ru 25 mārāyari bāvana ru 25 bavvanapaṁḍitula koḍuku nūṁ
kanabhaṭlu ru 25 kētarāju koḍuku bhaṁḍāri Eṟapōtu ru 20 gāṁ dama putrānu
pavitrikamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi pōyaṁgalavāru [.] svadataṁ paradataṁ
hva yō harēta vasuṁddharāṁ ṣaṣṭi¨rvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 6.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
